items.title: 'Speed, money and compassion' - lessons from an Ebola survivor and other experts
items.summary: Those caught up in West Africa's Ebola outbreak a decade ago on how best to tackle the current epidemic.

items.title: AI Used to Pinpoint Whale Heat Signatures to Prevent Ship Collisions in San Francisco Bay
items.summary: Scientists in California are using heat-sensing AI to save grey whales transiting through San Francisco Bay. More and more sightings of grey whales, a medium size baleen that can grow to between 40 an…
